problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
